title: Ender Dragon Gear
description: Get rewarded for defeating the final boss!
body:
![Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1190/523/logo_title-png.png)

Curseforge page is [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ender-dragon-gear)



  This is a simple mod that adds a new resource, the Ender Dragon Scale, which is used as an upgrade to Netherite tools.



  Every single Ender Dragon will drop one Scale and a Template that can be used to upgrade one piece of Netherite gear. The Smithing Template cannot be duplicated and it is just for consistency's sake. This one simple addition makes it worthwhile to fight multiple Ender Dragons, as many players probably don't see a reason to kill more than one or two.




Report bugs [Here](https://discord.gg/65Y5pn2TAW)



Go to my [Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuvzUmcTrqXztT7R1oJGQeg) for more updates and info.
